PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content.Length; if \($r.Content -match 'Founder'\) { "Found: Founder" } else { "NOT found: Founder" }; if \($r.Content -match 'auto-committed'\) { "Found: auto-committed" } else { "NOT found: auto-committed" }; if \($r.Content -match 'First 100'\) { "Found: First 100" } else { "NOT found: First 100" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; @\('Founder','auto-committed','First 100','Copy Prompt','3-layer','One-click revert'\) | ForEach-Object { if \($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($_\)\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $_" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $_" } } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })
